prestazioni: 2JZ-GE (non-turbo) engine swap to a fully built 2JZ-GTE with forged internals: CP pistons (87mm, 8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft. Pair with a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (0.96 A/R turbine housing) and a Tomei 272° camshaft set for high-RPM power delivery (800+ hp potential on E85).

Custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power with a 4-2-1 equal-length header setup (304-grade stainless) and a GReddy Revolution RS 71mm titanium muffler for optimal scavenging and weight reduction. Include a Tomei Type-S front pipe with a 3-inch diameter for improved turbo spool.

Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with a custom flex-fuel map for E85 compatibility, paired with ID1000x injectors and a Walbro 450 LPH fuel pump. Use a Turbosmart e-Boost2 boost controller and a custom intercooler setup with a GReddy intercooler core (600x300x76mm) and custom aluminum piping by Chase Bays.
estetica: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody kit (JDM-spec) with custom carbon fiber overfenders and a Rocket Bunny rear diffuser. Paint in Lexus Millennium Silver Metallic (1G3) with a matte black roof and mirror caps for contrast.

Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +22 front and 18x10.5 +30 rear wheels, wrapped in Toyo R888R 255/40/18 and 275/35/18 tires. Pair with BC Racing BR coilovers (Swift springs, 8kg front/10kg rear) and Cusco front and rear strut bars for chassis rigidity.

Custom JDM-inspired aero: Top Secret GT-style carbon fiber hood with a 3-inch cowl, custom carbon fiber side skirts by Vertex, and a TRD-style rear spoiler (carbon fiber, adjustable angle). Interior features Bride Zeta III seats (black Alcantara with red stitching), a Nardi Classic steering wheel (380mm, suede), and a custom roll cage by Cusco (bolt-in, 8-point, chromoly).
